articles.title: Buzzi shares edge higher on increased sales and strong cash generation

articles.title: What Does Buzzi’s Recent 36.6% Rally Mean for Investors in 2025?
articles.summary: If you have Buzzi stock on your watchlist, you are probably weighing up whether it is time to buy, hold, or move on. After all, seeing Buzzi rally a remarkable 245.5% over the past three years, and up another 36.6% in just the last 12 months, it is clear investors have been bullish on this name for quite a while. Even so, the story is not one-dimensional. In the last 30 days alone, Buzzi's price climbed 10.2%, only to dip modestly by 0.5% over the past week. These moves have come amid...
